object.name: deleteAllMessageReactions
object.description: Use this method to remove up to 10000 recent reactions in a group or a supergroup chat added by a given user or chat. The bot must have the 'can_delete_messages' administrator right in the chat. Returns True on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to remove up to 10000 recent reactions in a group or a supergroup chat added by a given user or chat. The bot must have the 'can_delete_messages' administrator right in the chat. Returns True on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to remove up to 10000 recent reactions in a group or a supergroup chat added by a given user or chat. The bot must have the 'can_delete_messages' administrator right in the chat. Returns :code:`True` on success.

annotations.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format :code:`@username`
annotations.name: chat_id

annotations.description: Identifier of the user whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a user
annotations.html_description: Identifier of the user whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a user
annotations.rst_description: Identifier of the user whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a user
annotations.name: user_id

annotations.description: Identifier of the chat whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a chat
annotations.html_description: Identifier of the chat whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a chat
annotations.rst_description: Identifier of the chat whose reactions will be removed, if the reactions were added by a chat
annotations.name: actor_chat_id
